meeting_notes.title: Project Echo Kickoff
meeting_notes.summary: Kickoff meeting for Project Echo. The team discussed and finalized the core tech stack (React, TypeScript, Vite for frontend; FastAPI, PostgreSQL for backend) and agreed on a glassmorphic dark-mode design system. Key initial tasks were assigned to Sarah, David, Emma, and Alex to set up base boilerplates and wireframes.
decisions: Use React + TypeScript + Vite for the frontend application.
Use Python + FastAPI for the backend API development.
Use PostgreSQL as the primary relational database.
Adopt a glassmorphic dark-mode theme for the UI design.

action_items.text: Initialize React project boilerplate with Vite and TypeScript
Draft initial PostgreSQL database schema design and migrations
Deliver high-fidelity Figma wireframes and layout designs
Set up Jira board and prepare project roadmap slides

transcript.speaker: Alex (PM)
transcript.text: Hi team, welcome to the kickoff for our new project. Today we need to align on the core features, select our technology stack, and distribute the initial development tasks.

transcript.speaker: Sarah (Frontend Dev)
transcript.text: For the client application, I'm proposing we use React + TypeScript built with Vite.

transcript.speaker: David (Backend Dev)
transcript.text: For the API backend, I suggest Python using FastAPI with PostgreSQL for storage.

transcript.speaker: Emma (Designer)
transcript.text: I will have the Figma wireframes for the dashboard finished by June 30th.

transcript.speaker: Alex (PM)
transcript.text: Great. Sarah, can you initialize the React boilerplate by Friday?

transcript.speaker: David (Backend Dev)
transcript.text: I will draft the initial database schema design by July 5th.

data.subject: Follow-up: Project Echo Kickoff
data.body:
Subject: Meeting Follow-up & Action Items: Project Echo Kickoff

Hi Team,

Thank you for joining today's meeting. Here is a summary of what was discussed, decisions made, and next steps.

### Executive Summary
Kickoff meeting for Project Echo. The team discussed and finalized the core tech stack (React, TypeScript, Vite for frontend; FastAPI, PostgreSQL for backend) and agreed on a glassmorphic dark-mode design system. Key initial tasks were assigned to Sarah, David, Emma, and Alex to set up base boilerplates and wireframes.

### Key Decisions
- Use React + TypeScript + Vite for the frontend application.
- Use Python + FastAPI for the backend API development.
- Use PostgreSQL as the primary relational database.
- Adopt a glassmorphic dark-mode theme for the UI design.

### Action Items
- [ ] Initialize React project boilerplate with Vite and TypeScript [Sarah] (Due: 2026-06-26)
- [ ] Draft initial PostgreSQL database schema design and migrations [David] (Due: 2026-07-05)
- [ ] Deliver high-fidelity Figma wireframes and layout designs [Emma] (Due: 2026-06-30)
- [ ] Set up Jira board and prepare project roadmap slides [Alex] (Due: 2026-06-26)


Best regards,
EchoScribe Meeting Assistant

calendar_event_tool_output.message: Calendar event evt_bb249d0dd5c3 scheduled successfully for 2026-07-02 (MOCK).
